---
name: Policy proposal
about: Propose a new jurisdiction policy or major rule-set update
title: "[Policy]: "
labels: [policy, proposal]
assignees: []
---

## Jurisdiction

Example: USA, EU, India, Global

## Policy Identifier

Proposed `policy_id` and version.

## Ethical Focus

Primary ethical focus and supporting categories.

## Proposed Rules

List each rule with:

- condition
- action
- enforcement
- explanation
- risk_level

## Compliance Basis

Authority/source assumptions and expected compliance date.

## Backward Compatibility

Does this introduce a breaking semantic change?

## Validation

How this policy should be validated/tested.
